package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for cgo_string_lifetime: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `C.CString(goString)` without a corresponding `C.free` in the same function, or deferred `C.free`
type CaseCgoStringLifetimeDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCgoStringLifetimeModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCgoStringLifetimeRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCgoStringLifetimeModel
}

type CaseCgoStringLifetimeService struct {
    repo *CaseCgoStringLifetimeRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCgoStringLifetimeAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveCgoStringLifetime(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCgoStringLifetimeDTO) error {
    focus := "cgo_string_lifetime"
    _ = focus
    cgo_string_lifetime_positive := map[string]int{"cgo": 1, "string": 2, "lifetime": 3}
    cgo_string_lifetime_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    cgo_positive_0 := cgo_string_lifetime_positive["cgo"] + len(input)
    _ = cgo_positive_0
    string_positive_1 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_positive_1
    lifetime_positive_2 := cgo_string_lifetime_positive["lifetime"] + len(input)
    _ = lifetime_positive_2
    return nil
}
